name: cde-privacy
title: Sensitive Data & Privacy
description: CDE-authored — PII/classification term reach, sensitivity mix & privacy exposure by source over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: PrivByTerm
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10

dataAccesses.name: SensMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sensitivity AS s, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity WHERE sensitivity IN ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: PrivBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
